calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-03-2015 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion To Schedule Prove-Up Hearing For Default Judgment By The Court
Off Calendar Jul-07-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Charles Crompton, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Mitch Lyon, #6848

Richard P. Fisher, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, MIGUEL BARRAGAN.
No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) CITY BAY ELECTRIC, LLC., POWERFUL SOLUTIONS, INC.; REGGIE STEVENSON.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.
Plaintiff Muiguel Barragan sworn and examinded on his own behalf.
After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows:

Damages: $21,134.00
Pre-Judgment Interest: $2,113.40
Attorney's Fees: $12,375.00
Costs: $1,019.95
Total Judgment in the amount of $36,642.35
Judgment signed in open court.
